summary: Phase 2 Confidence-Gated Auto-Draft PI Creation testing completed. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed (100%). Verified: (1) GET /api/posting-patterns/settings returns auto-post configuration with all required fields, (2) PUT /api/posting-patterns/settings updates configuration and returns updated fields, (3) GET /api/posting-patterns/ready-queue returns ready documents list with count and documents array, (4) GET /api/posting-patterns/vendor-summary returns vendor profiles with auto_post_eligible field, (5) POST /api/posting-patterns/draft-preview/{doc_id} returns graceful error for invalid doc, (6) POST /api/posting-patterns/create-draft/{doc_id} returns graceful error for invalid doc, (7) POST /api/posting-patterns/auto-draft-queue processes queue and returns results with drafted/skipped/errors counts, (8) GET /api/posting-patterns/auto-draft-eligibility/{doc_id} returns eligibility check result, (9) Auto-draft queue returns reason='Auto-post is disabled' when settings.auto_post_enabled is false, (10) Frontend /posting-intelligence page loads with all required elements.
critical_code_review_comments: Code review confirms Phase 2 Auto-Draft features are properly implemented:

1. ap_auto_post_service.py: check_auto_draft_eligibility function (lines 439-504) properly checks all gates: vendor number, existing draft, settings enabled, blocked vendors, allowed vendors, posting profile, confidence threshold, min invoices
2. ap_auto_post_service.py: attempt_auto_draft_pi function (lines 507-595) creates draft PI using learned posting template with proper safety (DRAFT only)
3. ap_auto_post_service.py: process_auto_draft_queue function (lines 598-655) processes ReadyForPost documents through confidence gate
6. posting_patterns.py: FRACHT fix for surcharge-aware simulation in _simulate_template_lines (lines 1359-1375) ensures surcharges with high presence rates are included
7. PostingPatternsDashboard.js: All required data-testid attributes present for testing
8. PostingPatternsDashboard.js: Auto-Draft Queue button and result banner properly implemented

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI elements verified, Auto-Draft Queue button works)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 Confidence-Gated Auto-Draft PI Creation fully tested. Key features verified: (1) All new endpoints return proper JSON responses, (2) Settings endpoint supports GET/PUT for auto-post configuration, (3) Auto-draft queue returns 'Auto-post is disabled' reason when disabled, (4) Eligibility endpoint returns graceful error for invalid docs, (5) Frontend page loads with all required elements and data-testid attributes, (6) Auto-Draft Queue button works and shows result banner. NOTE: Preview environment has no ReadyForPost documents, so auto-draft queue returns 0 processed (expected). BC credentials are placeholder in preview, so actual BC API calls would fail gracefully.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/posting-patterns/settings - Returns 200 with auto_post_enabled, min_confidence, min_invoices_analyzed, require_po_match, allowed_vendors, blocked_vendors - PASS
PUT /api/posting-patterns/settings - Updates and returns status=updated with updated fields - PASS
GET /api/posting-patterns/ready-queue - Returns 200 with count and documents array - PASS
GET /api/posting-patterns/vendor-summary - Returns 200 with count, vendors (with auto_post_eligible), settings, ready_total - PASS
POST /api/posting-patterns/draft-preview/invalid-doc-id - Returns 200 with error='Document not found' - PASS
POST /api/posting-patterns/create-draft/invalid-doc-id - Returns 200 with error='Document not found', success=false - PASS
POST /api/posting-patterns/auto-draft-queue - Returns 200 with processed, drafted, skipped, errors, details - PASS
POST /api/posting-patterns/auto-draft-queue (disabled) - Returns reason='Auto-post is disabled' when auto_post_enabled=false - PASS
GET /api/posting-patterns/auto-draft-eligibility/invalid-doc-id - Returns 200 with error='Document not found', eligible=false - PASS
unit_tests: check_auto_draft_eligibility: No vendor number returns eligible=false - PASS
check_auto_draft_eligibility: Existing draft returns eligible=false - PASS
check_auto_draft_eligibility: Auto-post disabled returns eligible=false - PASS
_confidence_meets_threshold: medium does not meet high - PASS
_confidence_meets_threshold: low does not meet medium - PASS
frontend_tests: Auto-Draft Queue button click shows result banner - PASS

mocked_apis.note: BC credentials in preview are placeholder. BC API calls would fail gracefully. Auto-draft queue returns 0 processed because there are no ReadyForPost documents in preview environment.
